ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the property location */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "land_sqft" INTEGER /* Square footage of the land */,
  "building_sqft" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the building */,
  "living_sqft" INTEGER /* Square footage of living space */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family home, condo, townhouse) */,
  "num_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "num_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "num_stories" INTEGER /* Number of stories */,
  "pool" INTEGER /* Whether the property has a pool */,
  "view" TEXT /* View type (e.g., ocean, mountain, city) */,
  "parking" TEXT /* Parking type (e.g., garage, street, none) */,
  "hoa_fee" REAL /* Monthly homeowners association fee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_zip_code FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "financing" (
  "financing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financing event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property */,
  "financing_percent" REAL /* Percentage of financing obtained */,
  "duration_days" INTEGER /* Duration of the financing in days */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage increase or decrease in financing */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan */,
  "lender" TEXT /* Name of the lender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financing_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zip_codes" (
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the ZIP code is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the ZIP code is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the ZIP code */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the ZIP code */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the ZIP code */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the ZIP code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, investor, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of access in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code for the trend data */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the trend data */,
  "average_value" REAL /* Average property value */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of property values */,
  "sales_volume" INTEGER /* Number of sales */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Number of properties in inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_zip_code FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic factor */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the factor on property values */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the economic factor (e.g., demographic, economic, environmental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factor_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact event */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the economic factor */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code affected by the factor */,
  "impact_date" TEXT /* Date of the impact */,
  "impact_value" REAL /* Value of the impact */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the impact (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_factor_impact_zip_code FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_factor_impact_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES economic_factors ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price of the sale */,
  "seller" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "buyer" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being rented */,
  "rental_date" TEXT /* Date of the rental */,
  "rent" REAL /* Rent amount */,
  "tenant" TEXT /* Name of the tenant */,
  "landlord" TEXT /* Name of the landlord */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_rentals_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_tax_records" (
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being taxed */,
  "tax_year" INTEGER /* Year of the tax */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of the tax */,
  "tax_due_date" TEXT /* Date the tax is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_tax_records_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
